style=""><br></div><div style=""><div>in RC reconcile:</div><div>&nbsp;- make sure that status.latestRuns.triggeredBy is up to date with spec.triggers.runConfigurations</div><div>&nbsp;- fetch RC dependencies (from triggers), compare status.latestRuns.triggeredBy with status.latestRuns.succeeded of the dependency, trigger run if different and update status.latestRuns.triggeredBy</div><div>&nbsp;- RC watcher to trigger reconciliation on dependent RCs (this would make sure that the reconcile is called in dependents whenever a RC succeeds, allowing them to check if they should trigger - see above)</div><div><br></div><div>status.latestRuns.triggeredBy tracks latest RC dependency run that triggered the RC run (to avoid RC updates triggering duplicate runs)</div><div><br></div><div>EDGE CASE:</div><div>- circular dependencies</div></div>"
